dr_section_ref: DR §1 — Indonesian discourse particles (kok, sentence-final use)
notes: Sentence-final 'kok' on a teasing-walkback ('cuma bercanda' = 'just joking') reassures the listener the speaker didn't mean offense. English 'honestly' carries the reassurance. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: 'just kidding, really' or 'I was kidding!' (with stronger emphasis) might capture the lighter mood better.
